name: Unnamed Project

files.filename: 创新研报｜2024年315全媒体舆情分析与品牌洞察报告_Wisers_2024.pdf

entity_types.name: GovernmentAgency
entity_types.description: Government departments responsible for regulation and enforcement.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Official full name of the government agency.

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: Geographic or functional area of authority.

examples: 深圳市市场监督管理局

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News organizations that report and shape public opinion.

attributes.name: platform_type
attributes.description: Type of media platform (e.g., newspaper, TV, social media).

entity_types.name: Company
entity_types.description: Commercial enterprises involved in production, sales, or services.

attributes.name: industry
attributes.description: Industry sector the company operates in.

entity_types.name: ConsumerAdvocate
entity_types.description: Individuals or groups actively voicing consumer rights concerns.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Name or alias of the advocate.

attributes.name: advocacy_focus
attributes.description: Primary area of consumer advocacy (e.g., food safety, finance).

entity_types.name: SocialMediaInfluencer
entity_types.description: Individuals with significant online followings who influence public discourse.

entity_types.name: IndustryAssociation
entity_types.description: Formal associations representing specific industry sectors.

attributes.name: association_name
attributes.description: Official name of the industry association.

entity_types.name: LegalExpert
entity_types.description: Professionals providing legal commentary or analysis on exposed cases.

attributes.name: specialization
attributes.description: Area of legal expertise (e.g., consumer law, advertising law).

entity_types.name: PlatformOperator
entity_types.description: Operators of digital platforms where content or commerce occurs.

attributes.name: business_model
attributes.description: Primary business model (e.g., e-commerce, social media).

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Generic type for any individual not fitting more specific categories.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Full name or known alias of the person.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Generic type for any organization not fitting more specific categories.

edge_types.name: REGULATES
edge_types.description: Agency imposes rules or oversight on entity.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media outlet publishes coverage about an entity or event.

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Entity publicly expresses opinion about another entity or issue.

edge_types.name: AFFILIATED_WITH
edge_types.description: Entity has formal or informal association with another.

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO
edge_types.description: Entity issues official or public response to criticism or event.

edge_types.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edge_types.description: Entities work together formally or informally.

edge_types.name: OPPOSES
edge_types.description: Entity publicly opposes or criticizes another entity’s actions.

analysis_summary: 文本聚焦‘糟心肉’等315曝光事件引发的舆论反应，涉及政府监管、媒体报道、企业回应、消费者声讨、平台下架等多方互动。实体设计需覆盖可发声主体：监管机构、媒体、涉事企业、意见领袖、法律人士、行业协会、平台方及普通网民。关系类型需体现监管、报道、评论、回应、合作与反对等社媒互动模式，以支持舆论传播路径模拟。
simulation_requirement: 5预测“糟心肉”事件对预制菜国标出台的推动力：推演在平行世界中，当“梅菜扣肉”涉及淋巴肉曝光后，公众对“预制菜”标签的集体排斥感及信任修复周期。
